title: Mirroring Subtask Status' over to other project boards
excerpt:

posts.author: qprice1067 (Quintin Price)
posts.cookedHtml:
I wanted to request Subitems have the same ability to mirror their status’ as parent item status’.

We have found this a critical need, as we need to utilize subitems being sent over to other boards through automation, but we also want multiple subitem status’ under a parent, to carry over their individual status.

posts.author: Fantasy-Media-Team (Fantasy Media Team)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @qprice1067 - not sure I fully understand your goal here.
You’d like the subitem to mirror their parent item as they move to other items? To keep the mirroring across boards?
As an example - Board A, Item 1, subitem 1.1. The subitem (1.1) has the same status as its item (1).
Then subitem moved to Board B, item 2, you still want it to reflect the status of item 1.
Is that correct?

posts.author: qprice1067 (Quintin Price)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, close. I want the status on board B to be the same status as subitem 1.1.

It seems currently that there is no way for that status to be mirrored.
